topic: Hunt for NOVEL, ambitious, out-of-the-box data-quality capabilities the prior reuse-first lineages deliberately did NOT propose. Each candidate (LLM-as-judge wired to a real ranking/gate consumer, auto-generated answerable-questions/semantic-intent fused into retrieval, knowledge-graph enrichment auto-extracted from doc content, cross-doc contradiction+staleness detection, doc-freshness decay with auto-refresh queueing, doc-quality leaderboard/dashboard, retrieval-driven auto-rewriting, automatic example/test generation from specs, embedding-drift monitoring with alerting, a context-budget optimizer under the truncation floor, auto-summarization rollup nodes, per-doc quality SLAs) gets: concept, value per reader (retrieval/adherence/logic), feasibility on this corpus, survival under the truncation law, go/no-go.
